cooperates.cooperate_desc: Unang una syempre si cecilion, kasi may passive sila na maabsorb niya si carmilla at ibabato ulit. at kapag nagawa yon, narereset yung mga skill ni carmilla.

Maganda din to kapag mag uulti ka, kasi pag inulti ni barats yung nalilink na target, apektado din sila sa kain ni barats at mas lalong tatagal na di sila makakagalaw kasi na susurpressed sila sa kain mi barats.

counters.counter_desc: Maganda to counter sa gloo kasi mas lalo kang mag heheal kapag nag 2nd skill si gloo sayo. at kapag nasaniban ka naman, di ka mamamatay kasi makunat ka. may possibility din na dalhin ka ni gloo sa mga kampi niya at pwede din yang opportunity na madami kang madadamay pag nag cast ka sa ulti mo.

dominants.dominant_desc:
eto yung ng dedepende sainyo early.
1st - tumulong ka mag damage sa jungler nyo para makapag rotate ng mabilis
2nd - pagkatapos mo tumulong sa jungle, punta ka kagad sa mid at mag fast clear para makapag rotate yung midlaner nyo.
3rd - pagkatapos mag fast clear, tumulong ka mag fast clear sa sidelane at mag vision ka sa jungle nila or kung sino.
4th - tuloy mo lang gawin yon (bonus na din kapag may mapitas kayo ng maaga) hanggang sa first turtle.
1st turtle - dapat sa gantong oras, level 4 ka na. kasi malaki ang impact neto kapag level 4 kana. mag zozone ka at aabangan mo ang teamfight. make sure din na tapos mag clear yung mga side lane para makapag sabay sa objective.

eto yung nakakapagod na part.
- Ang purpose mo dito ay babantayan mo lahat ng lane.
- dadalawin mo talaga lahat, at sa tulong ng emblem at sa rapid boots, mas lalo kang bibilis dumalaw.
- tumulong ka din mag zone at pitas para sa jungle nyo kung sa paningin mo makakapitas talaga kayo.
- make sure wag mo aksayain ang Ulti mo kasi mataas ang cooldown.

- Sa part na to, matuto ka umatras kapag magvivision ka tas madaming kalaban. matagal ka mabubuhay ulit kasi tatagal ang cooldown kapag tumatagal ang laro.
- dapat din matuto ka gumamit at mag timing ng Ulti mo, kasi sayo nakakadepende ang sitwason.
- at dapat may map awareness ka sa lahat ng parte ng mapa. samahan mo din yung mga nag sosolo sa mapa, kasi sila yung madalas mamamatay kapag nag pipick off kalaban.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Emblem:
Tank - perfect to sa passive mo na nagdadagdag hybrid defense habang umaatake ng matagal. 

Talents:
Agility and Wilderness Blessing - perfect to sa 2nd skill mo na lalong mas bibilis ka sa jungle and river kapag dadalaw ka sa mga lane.

Concussive Blast - Perfect to after casting ng Ult mo na mas lalo magkaka recieve ng damage kapag nag lilink ang mga target.

equips.equip_desc:
Perfect din to sa early.

Rapid Boots - useful to pag dadalaw ka kasi bibilis ka lalo sabay sa emblems.

Molten Essence - useful din to sa early para maka tulong mag sabay fast clear and makapag rotate at objective ng mabilis (Pero wag mo to iupgrade sa cursed helmet.) benta mo na din kapag late game na.

Dominance Ice - Sobrang Prio to. Perfect to sa Passive mo na magdadagdag hybrid defense na lalong kukunat ka habang tumatagal. magkaka effect yung passive na to lalo na pag mag cacast ka ng Ult.

Kapag mag Mid-Late na, depende na talaga sa sitwasyon ang item mo. Pero eto usually build ko kapag balanced.

Antique Cuirass - Lalo kukunat ka sa mga physical skill-based hero yung kalaban.

Radiant Armor - di ka naman mabuburst sa kalaban kaagad kasi makunat kana sa natanggap na hybrid defense, so eto nalang ginagamit ko kapag tumatagal sa teamfight, lalo ka kukunat. 

Charitise Pauldron -  eto naman pantapat mo sa mga mm kapag teamfight, kasi ikaw sasali sa mga damage nila. at habang ginagawa mo yon, lalo silang babagal umatake.

Eto naman last item mo para sa survival sa teamfight.

Immortality - eto muna kukunin mo para mag survive ka, at kapag nawala na ang passive neto, may 210s pa bago magkakapasive ulit. benta mo to kapag walang passive kasi every minute matters, madaming nangyayari kada segundo.

Winter Crown - eto iswap mo kapag wala nang passive ang immortality mo,  parepareho lang ang passive neto. benta mo na din kapag wala nang passive.

Blood Wings - at eto ang last na bibilhin mo kapag walang passive yung dalawa. magkaka shield ka neto para sa Survivability mo kasi every 20s mag regenerate ang shield.

hero.hero_overview: Puro Crowd Control Skills nya lalo na ulti. kaya kung bagay sayo na palagi kang nasa teamfight, pwede to sayo.
hero.hero_strength: Maganda to lalo na sa Teamfight dahil sa ulti niya, kailangan magandang timing na din. maliit ang percentage nya sa ban at pick rate kaya medyo di nyo makitaan ng potential. pero kapag marunong ka gumamit, wala nang papalag sayo sa teamfight.
hero.hero_weakness:
mga nakita kong weakness ay:

- anliit ng regen ni carmilla sa first skill niya, kaya wag ka masyadong agresibo kasi di gaanong sustain to.
- palagi kang uuwi sa base kasi nga mahina regen, unless nalang kapag bibili ka ng guardian helmet. (pero ma sasacrifice mo din isang slot ng item mo kung bibila ka.)
- mataas cooldown ng ulti nya early - mid, kaya timingan mo ulti mo.

data.recommend: kung gusto nyo imaster si carmilla, pwede to sayo.

spell.spell_desc: Perfect ang Petrify lalo na sa Ult mo. Pwede mo gamitin before pag cast ng Ult if sa tingin mo alanganin yung timing at makakatakas sila, Pwede din to after cast ng Ult mo, sa effects ng Ult, magkaka link ang mga targets at magkaka recieve sila ng damage sa mga nagkaka link. alam naman natin na may 1s immobalized after pagkaka cast ng ult,  sabayan mo din to ng petrify na magakaka dagdag ng 0.8s na di makakagalaw.

hero.hero_overview: Carmella relies on teamwork. If your wizard deals explosive damage, Carmella would be a good choice. Therefore, Carmella depends on teamwork and teammates.
hero.hero_strength: The hero Carmella has three skills. The first skill is damage and slowing, the second is control over the opposing hero, and the third, ultimate skill is crowd control, such as tying ropes on all enemy heroes. When the ultimate skill is activated, all enemy heroes will be permanently damaged.
hero.hero_weakness: Carmela is strong at the beginning of the match due to the damage from her first skill. In the middle of the match, she is less strong and effective due to the team's disorganization and lack of necessary equipment. However, towards the end of the match, Carmela becomes very powerful, making her a key player for the team, whose movements often decide the outcome of the game.

counters.counter_desc: The ultimate counter. His ultimate (Time Journey) provides a massive shield and, most importantly, removes all CC effects, instantly breaking the links from Carmilla's ultimate and keeping your team safe.

dominants.dominant_desc: To rotate effectively as Carmilla, prioritize roaming between the mid lane and side lanes during the early game, using your second skill (Bloodbath) for the movement speed boost to quickly close the gap for a gank. As a support or tank, your goal is to maintain high map awareness and hover near the turtle or lord pits as they spawn, since your ultimate, Curse of Blood, is most devastating when enemies are forced to clump together during objective contests. Focus on providing vision by checking bushes and initiating fights with a 2nd Skill (charge) > Ultimate > 2nd Skill (stun) combo, ensuring you stay close to your teammates so they can capitalize on the shared damage and crowd control your link provides.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Why Mid Game is Key?
- Unlocks Curse of Blood (Ultimate) links multiple enemies, spreading damage and CC.
- By this stage, she usually has Dominance Ice (anti-heal aura) and Oracle/Antique Cuirass for sustain.
- Team fights around Turtle or mid towers favor her kit — clustered enemies = maximum value.
- Impact: Carmilla becomes a team fight controller, turning skirmishes into wipeouts when allies burst linked enemies.
- Playstyle: Dive with Skill 2 stun, drop Revitalize, cast Ultimate to link enemies, and let teammates shred them.

emblems.emblem_desc: Agility, Tenacity, and Concussive Blast are strong emblem choices for Carmilla because they enhance her mobility, durability, and team fight impact — perfectly matching her role as a tanky support who thrives in extended battles.

equips.equip_desc: This build makes Carmilla a true frontline support — tanky, sustaining, disruptive, and able to set up fights for her team while keeping allies safe.

hero.hero_overview: Carmilla is a Support/Tank hero in Mobile Legends, known for her crowd control, sustain, and unique ultimate that links multiple enemies together, amplifying team damage and setting up devastating fight
hero.hero_strength:
- Passive (Vampire Pact) Steals enemies physical and magical defense, boosting her own durability.

- Skill 1 (Crimson Flower) Heals Carmilla while damaging nearby enemies, giving her sustain in fights

- Skill 2 (Bloodbath): A crowd-control skill that slows and stuns enemies — perfect for stopping invaders or protecting allies

- Ultimate (Curse of Blood) Links multiple enemies together; damage dealt to one spread to all linked targets, making her deadly in team fights.
hero.hero_weakness:
- Low damage output (offense rating 2/10).
- Relies heavily on team coordination to maximize her ultimate.
- Vulnerable if isolated without allies.

spell.spell_desc: - As a roaming support, Carmilla often rotates to protect teammates. Revitalize lets her turn ganks into survivable skirmishes, especially in early to mid-game when allies are squishier.

hero.hero_overview: Carmilla is a support/tank hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang known for her crowd control and life-draining abilities
hero.hero_strength: Carmilla excels as a support/tank hero with strong crowd control and sustain. Her unique skill set allows her to lock down enemies with stuns and slows, enabling her team to follow up with burst damage, making her a potent initiator and disabler in team fights.
hero.hero_weakness: Carmilla struggles against heroes with high burst damage or crowd control immunity, as her reliance on lifesteal and crowd control can be negated by such abilities. Additionally, she is vulnerable in the early game before she can stack her passive and lacks mobility without her second skill, making her susceptible to ganks.

spell.spell_desc: Carmilla with Purify excels at locking down enemies with her crowd control and then escaping or continuing the engagement, making her a strong initiator and disengager. Her ability to quickly close the gap with enemies, combined with her crowd control, allows her to disrupt enemy formations and secure kills, especially when combined with heroes that can follow up on her engages

emblems.emblem_desc:
*Vitality*
- Provides Carmilla with additional HP, making her more durable in fights.
- Enhances her survivability, allowing her to stay in combat longer.

*Tenacity*
- Increases Carmilla's physical defense, reducing damage taken from physical attacks.
- Complements Vitality, providing a more well-rounded defensive boost.

*Concussive Blast*
- Deals additional magic damage to enemies, scaling with Carmilla's magic power.
- Provides a damage boost, making Carmilla's abilities more impactful in team fights.

equips.equip_desc:
*Equipment Build for Carmilla*
1. *Tough Boots*: Provides physical defense and reduces damage taken, making Carmilla more durable in fights.
2. *Conceal*: Enhances Carmilla's ability to roam undetected, allowing her to set up ambushes and surprise enemies.
3. *Dominance Ice*: Increases Carmilla's magic power and ability to slow enemies, making her abilities more effective.
4. *Fleeting Time*: Reduces Carmilla's cooldowns, allowing her to use her abilities more frequently and stay active in fights.
5. *Thunder Belt*: Provides magic power, HP, and crowd control, making Carmilla a formidable opponent in team fights.
6. *Antique Cuirass*: Increases Carmilla's physical defense and reduces damage taken from physical attacks.
7. *Immortality*: Provides Carmilla with a second chance in fights, allowing her to revive and continue fighting.

*Why this build?*
This build focuses on making Carmilla a durable and formidable roamer:

- *Durability*: Tough Boots, Antique Cuirass, and Immortality provide Carmilla with physical defense, reduced damage taken, and a second chance in fights.
- *Roaming*: Conceal and Fleeting Time enhance Carmilla's ability to roam undetected and use her abilities frequently.
- *Damage*: Dominance Ice and Thunder Belt increase Carmilla's magic power and ability to slow enemies, making her abilities more effective.

hero.hero_overview: Carmilla summons two Crimson Flowers that circle around her for 5s, continuously dealing 100(+50%Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies hit and slowing them by 10% for 0.8s. The Slowing Effect can stack (up to 50%). The Crimson Flowers' circling speed is increased each time an enemy is hit.
hero.hero_strength:
1. *High Damage*: Carmilla's abilities deal significant magical damage, making her a formidable opponent in team fights.
2. *Crowd Control*: Her skills, such as Blood Bath and Curse of Blood, provide excellent crowd control, allowing her to disrupt enemy formations and set up ambushes.
3. *Sustainability*: Carmilla's Vampire Pact passive and Crimson Flower skill provide her with sustain, making her more durable in prolonged fights.
4. *Roaming Capabilities*: Carmilla's abilities and movement speed make her an excellent roamer, allowing her to move quickly around the map and influence multiple lanes.
5. *Game-Changing Ultimate*: Carmilla's Curse of Blood ultimate can turn the tide of a team fight, dealing significant damage and locking down enemy heroes.
hero.hero_weakness:
1. *Low Physical Defense*: Carmilla's physical defense is relatively low, making her vulnerable to physical attacks and burst damage.
2. *Dependence on Skills*: Carmilla's effectiveness relies heavily on her skills, which can leave her vulnerable when they're on cooldown.
3. *Limited Burst Damage*: While Carmilla deals significant damage, her burst damage is limited compared to other mage heroes.
4. *Vulnerability to CC*: Carmilla's mobility and effectiveness can be severely hindered by crowd control (CC) effects, such as stuns, silences, or slows.
5. *Mana Issues*: Carmilla's skills consume a significant amount of mana, which can lead to mana problems if not managed properly.
6. *Difficulty in Lane Phase*: Carmilla can struggle in the lane phase against heroes with strong harassment or sustain.

spell.spell_desc:
The best battle spell for Carmilla is *Flicker*. Here's why:

*Flicker's Benefits for Carmilla*
1. *Escape and Pursuit*: Flicker allows Carmilla to quickly reposition herself, escape from danger, or pursue enemies.
2. *Initiation and Setup*: Carmilla can use Flicker to initiate team fights or set up ambushes, catching enemies off guard.
3. *Synergy with Skills*: Flicker complements Carmilla's skills, such as Blood Bath and Curse of Blood, by allowing her to quickly close the distance or escape from enemies.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Carmilla is best paired with sustained damage Mages with CC abilities like Cecilion and Aurora, as her Ultimate can greatly amplify their strengths.

counters.counter_desc: Carmilla is countered by heroes that can ignore or remove her CC, such as Hanabi and Wanwan, since they can't be locked down by Carmilla's 2nd Skill or Ultimate.

dominants.dominant_desc: Upgrade Skill 1 at Level 1 and prioritize upgrading Skill 1 with Skill 2 as backup. Upgrade the Ultimate whenever it is available.

emblems.emblem_desc: Roaming: Full Defense to tank massive amounts of damage.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Cecilion pairs exceptionally well with Carmilla. His high damage output and long-range abilities complement Carmilla's crowd control and sustain, allowing for deadly combos. Carmilla can engage with her ultimate and crowd control, enabling Cecilion to land his heavy hits without much interference from the enemy. Their synergy in team fights is powerful, making them a great duo.

Hayabusa is mobility and burst damage work well with Carmilla's crowd control and healing. While he's good at diving into the backline, Carmilla can provide support by slowing enemies and using her ultimate to give Hayabusa more time to finish off his targets. However, Hayabusa's relatively squishy nature means he needs to rely on Carmilla's protection during critical moments.

Luo Yi's ability to deal magic damage and provide crowd control synergizes well with Carmilla's kit. While Luo Yi can control the enemy's positioning, Carmilla provides the frontline tankiness and sustain needed to keep the team safe. Their crowd control chain can effectively lock down enemies, but coordination is key for them to maximize their potential.

Khaleed is a solid hero, but his synergy with Carmilla isn't as strong as others. He excels in frontline combat, and Carmilla can help by supporting with heals and control. However, Khaleed's tendency to be very aggressive means Carmilla needs to be cautious with her crowd control usage, as it may disrupt his combos. They still have decent synergy but may require more coordination.

counters.counter_desc: Sun became extremely powerful in the current meta. With the ability to reduce defense and melt through tanks, he poses a serious threat to Carmilla. His multiple clones make it difficult for Carmilla to land crowd control, especially in chaotic team fights where targeting the right enemy becomes challenging. Additionally, Sun can reduce damage taken while attacking at high speed, overwhelming Carmilla with his sustain. Despite being tanky, Carmilla struggles to keep up with Sun's damage output. Effective positioning and skill timing are key to countering him, and relying on team support is essential. Without proper coordination, Carmilla can easily be overwhelmed by Sun's damage and tank-melting potential.

Alpha's strong burst and sustain can be a challenge for Carmilla. His ability to deal significant damage while tanking hits makes him a tough opponent. Carmilla needs to rely on her crowd control to prevent Alpha from diving into her team. Alpha's durability can give him an advantage in extended fights, but Carmilla can limit his effectiveness with well-timed stuns.

Zhuxin's crowd control and high damage output make him a strong counter to Carmilla. While Carmilla can attempt to counter his damage with her healing and crowd control, Zhuxin can effectively disable her during team fights. If Carmilla is not careful with positioning and ability usage, Zhuxin can take her down before she can respond.

Karrie is one of Carmilla's biggest counters. Karrie's true damage bypasses Carmilla's physical defense and can melt through her tanky build. Since Karrie targets low-health enemies, Carmilla's crowd control isn't enough to stop her once Karrie gains a lead. Carmilla needs to be cautious around Karrie, as she can easily outpace her sustain and damage reduction.

Estes is a tough counter for Carmilla due to his powerful healing. As a dedicated healer, Estes can counteract Carmilla's sustain and healing, making him a significant threat in extended fights. Carmilla may struggle to outheal Estes, especially if he boosts his allies healing. Proper positioning and early elimination of Estes are key to preventing him from tilting the battle in the enemy's favor.

Julian can be a tough opponent for Carmilla due to his crowd control abilities and burst damage. His skills can disable Carmilla during crucial moments in team fights, making it difficult for her to use her sustain and crowd control effectively. Julian's high burst potential can quickly overwhelm Carmilla if not carefully managed. If Carmilla can avoid his disabling abilities and disrupt his positioning, she has a chance to outlast him in extended fights.

dominants.dominant_desc: In the EXP lane, Carmilla's role is to establish early lane control and protect her team. Focus on clearing minions quickly and using your crowd control abilities to zone out the enemy laner. Carmilla can sustain in the lane with her healing abilities, making her a great choice to handle aggressive opponents. Rotate when possible to assist other lanes, and use your ultimate to provide area control and healing in early team fights. Positioning is key, as Carmilla thrives when she can absorb damage while supporting her teammates.
dominants.dominant_title: Establish map presence and protect your team.

dominants.dominant_desc: As a roamer, Carmilla should focus on assisting lanes and providing utility across the map. Use her strong crowd control to disable enemy heroes and help secure kills, particularly in the Gold and Mid lanes. Early roaming allows Carmilla to impact the game by controlling objectives and disrupting enemy movements. Her ultimate can be used to initiate or counter enemy engagements, providing healing and crowd control. Always be on the lookout for opportunities to rotate and provide support to your team in crucial moments.
dominants.dominant_title: Roam early and provide utility to your team.

dominants.dominant_desc: Since Carmilla has high base damage, don't hesitate to get Sky Piercer. Avoiding it due to the fear of "kill stealing" can result in letting the enemy escape. Remember, your base damage is already high, and you can use it confidently without worrying about "kill stealing".

emblems.emblem_desc:
Agility boosts movement speed, allowing you to roam effectively between lanes and respond quickly to team fights. This enhances your overall map control and positioning, especially when playing in both the Roam and EXP lanes.

Tenacity increases your damage reduction when you're below 40% HP, making you tankier during intense battles. This is perfect for Carmilla, as it helps her survive while being in the front line, absorbing damage and providing support for her team.

Concussive Blast adds extra crowd control, helping slow enemies and make your team's follow-up attacks more effective. It's especially useful for both roaming and when engaging enemies in the EXP lane, as it can help pin down high-priority targets.

equips.equip_desc:
This equipment setup is designed to maximize Carmilla's survivability and utility in both the Roam and EXP lanes. By focusing on durability and crowd control, this build ensures that she can withstand significant damage while providing essential support to her team. With a strong mix of physical and magical defense, Carmilla can tank damage effectively, especially in extended team fights.

The gear choice boosts her ability to sustain in combat, allowing her to deal with a variety of threats, including burst damage and sustained attacks. The additional movement speed ensures she can quickly roam and position herself during critical moments, while the crowd control effects enhance her ability to disrupt enemies. This setup makes Carmilla a reliable front-liner, able to engage, absorb damage, and protect her allies, all while providing essential crowd control and healing throughout the game.

This equipment setup for Carmilla focuses on maximizing her durability, sustain, and utility in both the Roam and EXP lanes. By prioritizing both physical and magical defense, this build makes her highly resistant to enemy damage while boosting her overall team support.


The Tough Boots provide resistance to crowd control, allowing Carmilla to move freely and engage in fights without being easily disrupted. The Encourage talent further enhances her team's overall effectiveness, boosting attack power and movement speed during crucial moments.

The Thunder Belt adds more crowd control and sustain through its passive effect, ensuring Carmilla can slow enemies while dealing extra damage. Dominance Ice reduces enemy attack speed and provides additional armor, helping Carmilla tank against physical damage dealers while offering a significant debuff to the opposing team.


Clock of Destiny boosts Carmilla's magic power over time and grants additional health, making her even more durable and allowing her to deal stronger damage through her abilities. Athena's Shield grants magical resistance and provides a shield to absorb incoming damage, keeping Carmilla alive longer against mages. Lastly, the Guardian Helmet restores health over time, further increasing her tankiness and sustaining her during long team fights.

Overall, this setup ensures that Carmilla remains a reliable tank support, capable of withstanding heavy damage while providing essential utility to her team.

hero.hero_overview: Carmilla is a powerful mage support hero in Mobile Legends, known for her ability to control the battlefield and provide excellent crowd control for her team. With her healing, movement speed buff, and powerful area-of-effect (AoE) crowd control abilities, Carmilla is highly effective in both offense and defense. She excels in team fights, making her a valuable asset for her team, especially in the late game.
hero.hero_strength:
Strong Crowd Control: Carmilla's abilities allow her to control large areas, making her great at disrupting the enemy team.
Sustain: Her ultimate, "Moonlight Immersion," not only damages enemies but also heals allies in the area, providing excellent team sustain during fights.
Team Utility: Carmilla offers buffs, slows enemies, and provides vision, all of which are critical for team engagements.
Good Scaling: She scales well into the late game with the ability to continuously impact team fights, especially when combined with items that enhance her magic damage.
hero.hero_weakness:
Low Mobility: Carmilla lacks mobility, making her an easy target for assassins or fast-moving enemies.

Vulnerable to Burst: She has low durability and can be quickly eliminated by high burst damage heroes.

Team Reliant: Carmilla's potential is tied to her team's success. She is less effective when isolated or without support.

Positioning Dependent: Effective use of Carmilla's skills requires precise positioning. Poor positioning can lead to missed opportunities or getting caught.

data.recommend: Based on my own gaming experience.

spell.spell_desc: The Vengeance spell reflects a portion of the damage taken back to nearby enemies. It's ideal for tank and support heroes like Carmilla, allowing her to punish enemies who focus on her. Best used in team fights when surrounded by enemies, it enhances her tanking ability and makes her more durable against burst damage. Timing and positioning are crucial to maximize its effectiveness.

data.title: Carmilla build for damage and defense

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Strong AOE damage with Cecillion, absolutely perfect couple.

counters.counter_desc: Bad situation when Diggie ult after Carmilla ult, absolutely disaster.
Pushing away Panda, ********.
Need a perfect time after Faramis ult time is end or on CD.

dominants.dominant_desc: Use the second skill for forward through enemies and see enemies position are close or not, if close just use ult to linked all of it, but make sure your teammates are close with you.

emblems.emblem_desc: Need movement spd for running and more tankier.

equips.equip_desc: I choose those item its because thunderbelt can be perfect match for the passive, Fleeting time for the ult CD and others important for the counters.

hero.hero_overview: Carmilla ult is absolutely a beast when you got all the enemy inside of it. Not too tanky but the damage of thunderbelt is so perfect match with passive.
hero.hero_strength:
Early, first skill damage is pretty good and it can be actually good for helping teammates killing creeps.

Mid, after level 4 Carmilla can start the teamfight with her team with starting a ult, but make sure the ult get between 5 and 2 enemy inside of it.

Late, after all equipment get ready, Carmilla become more tanky and can absolutely good at starting teamfight, but if enemy have crowd control tank or Mathilda just make sure your ult is completely okay for putting it or it can be absolutely  garbage if you miss all the enemy for the ult.
hero.hero_weakness:
Early, she weak at escaping with just a second skill for the sprint kind of type.

Mid, after buying thunderbelt she not really good at stacking but it perfectly match with her passive.

Late, weak against Franco, Alpha, Claude those heroes with the strong blink skill and deal very effective damage on Carmilla.

spell.spell_desc: Can control when the ult is linked, it helps pretty well when helping your teammate attacking the enemy.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Insane with her ult

counters.counter_desc: Passive is crazy

dominants.dominant_desc: Vengeance works great=more enemies more defence
dominants.dominant_title: Initiate teamfights as soon as lvl 4 and don't be afraid to make sacrifices

emblems.emblem_desc: Good teamfight and sustainability

equips.equip_desc: Toughness-Queen's Wings

spell.spell_desc: Increased sustainability

cooperates.cooperate_desc: This couple combo is rare to see in matches! They have additional skill when they are in the same team. Cecilion will have "Moonlit Waltz" skill, he can carry Carmilla and gain shield. This skill can be used to save Carmilla from enemies, or to surprise attack the enemies. This extra skill will be super good if both the Cecilion and Carmilla user have good communication or chemistry, so the timing to use this skill is perfect. I personally love to use this combo with my friend.
Classic AoE burst damage. Odette's ultimate skill is good to follow up Carmilla's ulti.
Carmilla's ultimate skill + Gatotkaca's ultimate skill? A pretty much deadly combo! With Gatotkaca's large AoE CC and damage, the enemies will take lot of damage and hard to escape.

counters.counter_desc: Estes' ultimate skill will make the enemies close together, so Carmilla can easily capture them with her ultimate skill.

dominants.dominant_desc: Carmilla's regen effect is in her first skill (Crimson Flower). Her skill circles around her clockwise, and the regen effect will trigger when her skill hit the enemies. When using her first skill, stick to the enemies and circle them counterclockwise to increase the amount of hit to the enemies and gain more HP regen.

My go-to combo when using her ultimate is:
1. 2nd skill (Bloodbath) first phase to gain movement speed and approach the enemies.
2. Ultimate skill (Curse of Blood) to link the enemies
3. 2nd skill second phase to stun the enemies, prevent them from escaping
4. 1st skill (Crimson Flower) to deal damage and reduce their defense. In this step, hopefully the ally team have already cast their damage. If everything goes well, the enemies could be easily wiped out.

emblems.emblem_desc: I use this emblem set to make her more sustain, with the regen stats and extra HP. Carmilla have regen effect in her first skill (Crimson Flower), so the extra spell vamp form Festival of Blood can improve her regen effect. Concussive Blast help with the extra damage.

equips.equip_desc:
Carmilla use tough boots to minimize the CC and slow effect. Use Encourage to help ally(ies) increase their damage dealt.
Use Dominance Ice to reduce enemies' regen effect and attack speed.
Use Guardian Helmet to make Carmilla more tanky.
The rest of the item actually depends on the enemies, but I mainly use full defense item. You can use Fleeting Time (optional) when you're in a winning position, so you can use her ultimate skill with faster cooldown and give more pressure to enemies.

Tough Boots, Dominance Ice, and Guardian Helmet is used just like my build before. Use Conceal if you want to surprise the enemies with the sudden ultimate skill, just like the other initiator tank. Use Fleeting Time to help decreasing the cooldown of her ultimate. Use more defense item for the rest item slots, adjust with the enemies.

hero.hero_overview: Carmilla is a support-tank hero, so she is pretty much sustain in war, especially with her first skill (Crimson Flower), and her passive (Vampire Pact) that can steal enemy's defense. Her ultimate skill is also good for initiating war.
hero.hero_strength: Carmilla's ultimate skill (Curse of Blood) make enemies in the area linked together, and they will share the damage taken. Carmilla is great to use when the enemies are likely to be grouped together in war (support healer, chip, etc) and low mobility heroes. Her ultimate needs to be followed by crowd control skill and team's damage dealer to maximize its potential. Carmilla is good to be in a team with area/burst damage.
hero.hero_weakness: Carmilla have two control skills, her 2nd skill when tapped the second time (Bloodbath and her ultimate skill (Curse of Blood). It's kinda hard to aim her control skill to enemy heroes with high mobility (like assassins), but it can be done in right timing. Pay attention to her ultimate skill placement, so it caught the enemy(ies). Enemies can lose the link from Carmilla's ultimate when they far apart, so team should follow up her ultimate quickly.

spell.spell_desc:
Carmilla's battle spell is flexible.
- I mainly use Vengeance. Carmilla is a tanky hero, so she takes a lot of damage. You can use Vengeance when enemy attacks you. Vengeance gave you damage reduction and also deals damage to the attacker.
- You can use Petrify to give extra control effect to enemy(ies), combo example: ultimate skill (Curse of Blood) followed by Petrify.
- You can use Flicker if you want to initiate war with surprise attack, or to have more escape skill.
